chat_messages.content: The New Balance 840 Walking (NB‑WALK‑840) is the best match for you – it scores 84.6 on KeepScore, fits about 88 % of shoppers like you, and stays well under your $130 budget. Reviewers consistently praise its soft, supportive feel for all‑day standing and long walks, so you can expect a comfortable, stable ride right out of the box. Just be aware that, like many cushioned trainers, it may need a brief break‑in period to reach peak comfort.
now i want the running shoe under 80$ budget

The Fresh Foam 680v8 (NB‑680V8) is the top pick for a running shoe under $80—it scores 79.3 on KeepScore, fits about 84 % of shoppers like you, and is praised for its soft, responsive under‑foot feel that matches the cushioned comfort you liked in the New Balance 840 walking shoe, all while staying well within your new budget. Just keep in mind the modest 12 % return risk, which often comes from the shoe’s lighter construction that may need a brief break‑in period for optimal durability.
